narration: Here. USV session, 416 seconds. The LIDAR companion IMU was declared but never published a single message — while the point cloud stream on the same sensor ran nominal at 10 Hz. A silent driver failure, not a QoS mismatch.

first_finding_modifiers.accent: full ACCENT amber #ffb840 returns — discovery energy above block_07's muted #c49648, but amber is used only on (a) healthy stream outline/counts, (b) final diagnosis lockup, NOT flooded across the frame
first_finding_modifiers.dead_stream: MUTED_RED #aa5656 family borrowed from block_07's REJECTED tag — signals 'this is the wrong side'
first_finding_modifiers.health_stream: HEALTH_FG #bae6aa secondary color on healthy counts
first_finding_modifiers.composition: paired two-column card holds across beats B with staggered reveal; viewer locks on asymmetry
first_finding_modifiers.qos_rejection: uses block_07's strike-through + REJECTED tag verbatim
first_finding_modifiers.energy_vs_block_08: no BUG/FIX lockup, no amber flood — this is evidence discovery, less climactic than the diff payoff

beats.name: case identity

beats.name: paired streams
beats.content: /lidar_imu (SILENT, 0 msgs, 0.00 Hz) vs /lidar_points (NOMINAL, 4318 msgs, 10.00 Hz) with staggered reveal and 'same LIDAR sensor pod · same QoS profile advertised' connector

beats.name: reject QoS
beats.content: QoS mismatch card struck through + REJECTED, then 'why not QoS' panel: identical QoS advertised, no recorder warnings, zero messages emitted (not dropped)

beats.name: diagnosis lockup
beats.content: 'silent driver failure.' hero + pill row (bug_class=sensor_timeout, confidence=0.95, scope=session-global · 416.76 s) + driver-param footer
